hard_stops.logic: project must be initialized before any accessibility or fair housing review activities begin
design has unresolved Fair Housing Act design and construction requirement violations — federal liability exposure
ADA accessibility violations remain unresolved — DOJ enforcement risk and potential private right of action
tenant screening or marketing criteria reference protected class characteristics — Fair Housing Act violation

soft_flags.logic: Type A accessible unit count is below code requirement — design revision needed before permit
reasonable accommodation requests are pending review — timely response required under fair housing law
staff fair housing and accessibility training is overdue — compliance risk and liability exposure
